case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. LUCILLE MCGEE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SERVED APR-20-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCGEE, LUCILLE AKA LUCILLE MCCREE
